name: Azure Load Balancer
prompt:
You are drafting a FreeTierAtlas v2 entry. Output JSON only (no markdown).

Required: write short, user-oriented decision guidance fields:
- whenToUse: 1-2 sentences (specific, practical, avoids fluff)
- whenNotToUse: 1-2 sentences (clear tradeoffs/constraints)
Required: write quickstartSteps as 3-6 numbered setup steps.
Required: write quickstartSteps as 3-6 numbered setup steps.

Constraints
- Keep description to one sentence, max 24 words.
- Use concise lists (3-5 items) for arrays.
- Use conservative defaults when unsure.
- Use ISO date ${today} for lastUpdated.
- Use kebab-case slug derived from name: ${slug}.
- Prefer provider names: Azure, AWS, Google Cloud, Cloudflare, Oracle Cloud, Supabase, GitHub, Microsoft, IBM, DigitalOcean.
- Category should be short Title Case (e.g., "Serverless Compute", "Container Registry"). Avoid hyphenated or lowercase-only labels.
- If docsUrl is unknown, set to empty string. If you know the official docs, include it.
- Output must validate schema.

Schema:
{
  title: string,
  description: string,
  provider: string,
  category: string,
  domain: "hosting"|"compute"|"database"|"storage"|"auth"|"messaging"|"observability"|"ai"|"devops"|"security"|"networking"|"productivity"|"learning"|"design"|"analytics"|"integration"|"operations"|"other",
  subtypes: string[],
  audiences: ("student"|"indie"|"startup"|"team"|"enterprise"|"oss"|"agency")[],
  tags: string[],
  pricingModel: "free"|"freemium"|"trial",
  freeTierDetails: {
    summary: string,
    limits: string[],
    caveats?: string[],
    resetPeriod?: string,
    requiresCard?: boolean,
    freeTierType?: "always-free"|"time-limited"|"credit"|"trial",
    hasHardCap?: boolean,
    overageRisk?: "none"|"low"|"medium"|"high",
    billingRiskNotes?: string[],
    trialDays?: number,
    monthlyCreditAmount?: string
  },
  useCases: string[],
  quickstartSteps: string[],
  whenToUse: string,
  whenNotToUse: string,
  bestFor: string[],
  avoidIf: string[],
  difficulty: "beginner"|"intermediate"|"advanced",
  productionReadiness: "prototype"|"side-project"|"production-light"|"production-ready",
  lastUpdated: string,
  popularityScore: number,
  usefulnessScore: number,
  officialUrl?: string,
  docsUrl?: string,
  sourceUrls?: string[],
  featured?: boolean,
  body: string
}

Entry context:
- name: Azure Load Balancer
- officialUrl: https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/pricing/details/load-balancer/
- kind: tools

Return JSON only.
